title: Growth Speed Comparison of Common Plants

visualChannels.comment: The amount of growth per day is shown in a literal way. We don't only see the size but also the differences in the form of the plant itself, that arise through its growth. We didn't add geometry because the growth effect is more complex.
The size of the ring changes according to the growth per day.

contextualAttributes.comment: The camera moves and zooms in and out.
